polymer-genomics.description: Polymer Genomics API — 70 tools, 48 layers, physics linter, methylation suite.

biocontext-kb.description: BioContextAI Knowledgebase — 14 APIs (UniProt, AlphaFold, STRING, Reactome, Open Targets, Ensembl, PanglaoDB, EuropePMC, …).

bio-mcp-bedtools.description: bedtools CLI wrapper from the bio-mcp org.

bio-mcp-seqkit.description: seqkit CLI wrapper from the bio-mcp org.

claim-ir.description: FormalClaim IR — schema validation, local evaluation, corpus search (ships with polymer-formalclaim).
